releases.notes: Auto-save and auto-resume at 69% context threshold
Context Continuity Overhaul - 11 improvements to context management
Proactive Code Quality — Gofer now automatically scans your workspace for common AI-generated code issues when sessions reach high utilization, providing a clear summary of what was cleaned up.
Richer Conversation Insights — Tool interactions in the Conversation History panel now show both the request and the response, giving you complete visibility into what happened during each tool call.
Better Context Visibility — Token usage estimates are now visible directly in the sidebar for each conversation category. See at a glance where your context budget is being spent.
Streamlined Sidebar — Cleaner, more intuitive organization of the Memory and Context panels. Removed redundant sections to reduce clutter and improve navigation.
Click to Explore Context — Every category in the Context Window panel is now clickable. View detailed content for spec artifacts, memories, conversation history, and more with a single click.
Multi-Session Monitoring — Monitor up to 3 concurrent Claude Code sessions simultaneously with real-time context health, color-coded utilization indicators, and stale session detection.
Engineering Quality Rubric — Automated quality validation using a 10-category scoring system. Six specialist agents run in parallel to check correctness, security, performance, and more.
Context Health Management — Real-time context window monitoring with health status indicators, smart stage-aware recommendations, and three-tier observation decay to preserve important information.
